text:
<https://www.freebsd.org/security/unsupported/> releng 13/1 is no longer supported.

Patricio Villar, the schedule at <https://www.freebsd.org/releases/14.0R/> is likely to change, you might like to test what will become available on or around Wednesday 13th October.
